name: YJAutoPostOnX
description: Automated posting tool for X.com (Twitter) — AI tweet generation, CSV-based scheduling, Playwright automation

scripts.test: node test/referral-toggle.test.js && node test/e2e-generation.test.js && node test/reportEngine.test.js && node test/session-manager.test.js && node test/api-key-leak.test.js && node test/rate-limit-persist.test.js && node test/max-tokens-cap.test.js && node test/security-logs.test.js && node test/profile-numbering.test.js && node test/semantic-dedup.test.js && node test/publish-decoupling.test.js && node test/publish-fixes-v511.test.js && node test/dynamic-prompt-v512.test.js && node test/deferred-retry-v512.test.js && node test/auditor-comments.test.js && node test/queue-consume.test.js && node test/resilience-v518.test.js && node test/stop-during-toast-wait.test.js && node test/detect-format.test.js && node test/opencode-go-format.test.js && node test/diagnostic-pipeline.test.js && node test/verify-edge-cases.test.js && echo '  ALL TESTS PASSED'
scripts.test:electron: xvfb-run -a electron --no-sandbox test/smoke.test.js && xvfb-run -a electron --no-sandbox test/ipc-generation.test.js && xvfb-run -a electron --no-sandbox test/full-ui.test.js

author: Antigravity
